name: Aurigo Software Technologies, Inc.
h1: Aurigo Software Technologies's GCC footprint in India
lede: Aurigo Software Technologies runs three centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Mysuru, covering R&D and IT, built over 26 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aurigo Software Technologies office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Aurigo Software Technologies GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Aurigo Software Technologies runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mysuru), covering R&D and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Aurigo Software Technologies's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Mysuru, spanning R&D and IT. The centers deliver IT and R&D and ER&D for the group's global operations.
